title: Corporate network unreachable via VPN
description: All attempts to reach corporate network via VPN result in timeout.
resolution: Uninstalled AnyConnect, cleared all registry entries, fresh install from IT portal.

title: Cannot install software on new MacBook
description: Getting permission denied when trying to install tools via Homebrew. New M2 MacBook.
resolution: Enrolled device in MDM via Jamf. Granted temporary admin rights. Homebrew installed successfully.

title: AnyConnect profile missing
description: AnyConnect saying 'No valid certificate' - profile seems to have been wiped.
resolution: Re-deployed AnyConnect profile from SCCM. Certificate re-enrolled. Connected.

title: Laptop missing IT admin rights
description: Cannot install certain apps. Getting 'You do not have admin privileges' error.
resolution: Raised admin rights request to IT manager. Approved and applied via Jamf. Software installation working.

title: VPN timeout on connection attempt
description: VPN spins for 60 seconds then times out with connection error.
resolution: Flushed DNS, reset TCP/IP stack, reinstalled VPN client. Timeout issue gone.

title: GitHub 2FA blocking access
description: Two-factor authentication via Okta blocking GitHub login. Getting SAML error.
resolution: Synced Okta group with GitHub SAML app. 2FA via Okta now working. Access granted.

title: GitHub permission level incorrect
description: I have read access but I need write access to the infrastructure-terraform repo.
resolution: Updated team membership to give Maintain access on infrastructure-terraform. Push working.

title: GitHub SSO not working
description: SSO keeps redirecting and failing. Can't authenticate to GitHub via company SSO.
resolution: Cleared SSO session in Okta. Re-triggered SAML auth flow. GitHub SSO working.

title: New laptop setup assistance needed
description: Received new MacBook Pro. Need help setting up dev environment. Not sure what to install.
resolution: Ran IT onboarding script from internal portal. Installed: Homebrew, pyenv, node, docker, VS Code. Dev environment ready.

title: Docker not running on new laptop
description: Docker Desktop won't start. Error: 'Cannot connect to Docker daemon'. New laptop.
resolution: Docker Desktop requires 'Allow the default Docker socket to be used' in settings. Enabled. Docker running.

title: Remote access VPN broken
description: Cannot access internal resources. VPN icon shows connected but no traffic routing.
resolution: Routing table corrupted. Reset with 'route /f', reconnected VPN. All traffic routing correctly.

title: Reimbursement not processed
description: Submitted expense claim 3 weeks ago but amount not reimbursed yet.
resolution: Reimbursement was pending manager approval. Escalated to manager. Approved and processed.

title: VPN drops connection intermittently
description: VPN connects but drops after 5-10 minutes. Very disruptive during calls.
resolution: Updated AnyConnect to latest version, reconfigured split tunnel settings. Stable now.

title: GitHub 403 forbidden on repo access
description: GitHub returns 403 Forbidden when accessing the mobile-app repo. SSO enabled on org.
resolution: SSO session expired. User re-authenticated via Okta. Added to correct GitHub team. Access granted.

title: New joiner needs GitHub access
description: New joiner onboarding - need GitHub org access as part of day 1 setup.
resolution: Added to GitHub org as part of onboarding checklist. Assigned to team based on role.

title: Cannot install Homebrew on new Mac
description: Homebrew install script fails with 'Permission denied' on new corporate MacBook.
resolution: Device not MDM-enrolled. Enrolled via Jamf Self Service. Homebrew install succeeded after enrollment.

title: Incorrect HRA calculation
description: HRA component in my payslip looks incorrect. City changed to metro last month.
resolution: HR updated city classification to metro in HRMS. HRA recalculated from month start.

title: Request access to engineering GitHub org
description: Just joined the engineering team. Need to be added to the GitHub organisation.
resolution: Sent GitHub org invitation. Added to engineering-all team. Confirmed user can access all team repos.

title: SSH keys not working after new laptop
description: New laptop, copied SSH keys but Git push failing authentication. Keys not being picked up.
resolution: Wrong SSH key format. Regenerated ed25519 key, added to GitHub, updated ~/.ssh/config. Auth working.

title: Leave balance not updated
description: I took 3 days leave last week but my leave balance still shows the same number.
resolution: Leave management system sync delay. Manually updated leave balance in HRMS. Shows correct now.

title: Need access to GitHub repo
description: I need access to the backend-api repository to start working on my tasks. Manager approved.
resolution: Manager approval verified in email. Added user to GitHub org via admin console. Granted read access to backend-api repo.

title: Wrong tax deduction in payslip
description: Tax deducted this month seems much higher than usual. Possible error in TDS calculation.
resolution: TDS recalculated. Previous month had arrears that caused spike. Corrected in next payroll.

title: VS Code extensions not installing
description: VS Code marketplace not loading. Extensions failing to install. Proxy issue maybe.
resolution: Configured proxy in VS Code settings.json. Set http.proxy to corporate proxy URL. Extensions loading.

title: Cannot clone internal repository
description: Getting 'repository not found' when trying to clone internal repo. Assume it's a permissions issue.
resolution: User not in GitHub org. Sent invite via GitHub admin. User accepted. Repository now visible.

title: Unable to connect VPN from home
description: Working from home, VPN was fine last week. Now it won't connect at all.
resolution: Full AnyConnect uninstall + reinstall with latest profile from IT portal. Connected.

title: Need write access to deployment repo
description: Need write/admin access to the k8s-deployments repo to push release artifacts.
resolution: Granted Admin role on k8s-deployments repo. Verified push and release creation working.

title: Access denied to private repo
description: Private repo shows 404 even after logging in. Think I need to be added.
resolution: Added user to private-repos GitHub team via admin. 404 resolved, repo accessible.

title: Dev environment setup not working
description: Followed onboarding doc but Python/pip not found. Fresh MacBook setup.
resolution: Installed pyenv via Homebrew. Set Python 3.11 as default. pip and venv working.

title: VPN client crashes on launch
description: AnyConnect client crashes with no error message. Have to force-close it.
resolution: Disabled Windows Defender real-time protection temporarily, reinstalled AnyConnect, re-enabled protection.

title: Split tunnel VPN not routing
description: Connected to VPN but cannot reach internal servers, only internet works.
resolution: Reconfigured split tunnel policy via AnyConnect profile editor. All routing now correct.

title: VPN not connecting after Windows update
description: After installing the latest Windows update, Cisco AnyConnect fails to connect. Error: 'Unable to establish VPN'. Tried restarting.
resolution: Uninstalled AnyConnect, deleted HKLM\SOFTWARE\Cisco\Cisco AnyConnect registry key, reinstalled AnyConnect 4.10. Issue resolved.

title: Cannot connect to corporate VPN
description: Getting 'Connection attempt failed' error when trying to connect to VPN. Was working fine yesterday.
resolution: Deleted corrupted VPN profile from %ProgramData%\Cisco. Reinstalled client. Resolved.

title: Investment declaration not saved
description: Tried to save investment declaration but getting error. Deadline is tomorrow.
resolution: Investment declaration portal had server error. IT fixed. User saved declaration successfully.

title: Python not found after laptop reset
description: Wiped and reset laptop. Now Python 3 is missing. Need to set up environment again.
resolution: Installed pyenv, set global Python to 3.11.6. Added pyenv to .zshrc. pip working.

title: Salary not credited this month
description: My salary for March has not been credited to my account. Today is the 5th.
resolution: Payroll team confirmed processing delay due to bank holiday. Salary credited within 24 hours.

title: Cannot see team repositories on GitHub
description: Joined team 2 weeks ago but can't see any of the team's private repositories.
resolution: User was in org but not assigned to team. Added to correct team. All team repos now visible.

title: Form 16 not received
description: Financial year ended. Still haven't received Form 16 for ITR filing.
resolution: Form 16 generated and emailed to registered email. Also available in HR portal under Documents.

title: VPN authentication failure
description: VPN keeps asking for credentials then failing. Password is definitely correct.
resolution: Cleared credential cache via Windows Credential Manager. VPN auth working again.

title: AnyConnect error after KB5034441
description: Error message: 'AnyConnect was not able to establish a connection'. Windows update KB5034441 installed this morning.
resolution: Registry key HKLM\SOFTWARE\Cisco overwritten by Windows update. Deleted key, reinstalled AnyConnect.

title: Cannot push to GitHub repository
description: Can read repos but getting 'permission denied' when pushing. Need write access.
resolution: Changed repo permission from Read to Write for user. Confirmed push access working.

title: Network access lost after update
description: After Windows update, lost access to all internal network resources.
resolution: Rolled back Windows update KB5034441. Reinstalled AnyConnect. Network access restored.

title: Payslip not available on portal
description: Cannot download March payslip from HR portal. Page shows blank after login.
resolution: Session timeout issue on HR portal. Cleared cache, used incognito. Payslip downloadable now.

title: Node.js version conflict on new machine
description: Project needs Node 18 but system has Node 20. nvm install failing.
resolution: Installed nvm via Homebrew. Set default to Node 18.19. Project dependencies installed successfully.

title: Cisco AnyConnect fails on startup
description: AnyConnect opens then immediately crashes. Happened after automatic Windows update last night.
resolution: Ran AnyConnect repair, cleared profile cache, reinstalled. Working now.
